title: aspidium squamisetum
intro: Aspidium squamisetum, also known as the Lizard's Skin Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Aspidium squamisetum include its potential to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and processing the fronds to create infusions or decoctions for medicinal use.
